title: The Crew Prepares to Sail
description: On pages 17–20, the crew prepares to sail as the battle on Little Garden closes with the giants’ pride restored and the Straw Hats preparing to leave the ancient island.
scene: The Crew Prepares to Sail. The battle on Little Garden closes with the giants’ pride restored and the Straw Hats preparing to leave the ancient island. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Gah! What the hell are they!?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Trying to kill me, are you now?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: That's some big balls you've got, you damned, dirty...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: One of the strawberries turned out to be just barely alive,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But I just finished him off for sure so worry not.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now, I'm not sure if this is the

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now, I'm not sure if this is the same thing.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: You had carried out the mission success- fully...?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Ah, well I thought I had.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: But one of the buggers was a lot more tenacious than I thought...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You had given me a false report at that time...

summary: This part centers on the crew prepares to sail, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
